seed.title: Nimbus CRM
seed.tagline: Customer pipeline tool for small teams
seed.description: A lightweight CRM with kanban pipelines, email sync, and real-time collaboration — built solo in six weeks.

seed.title: PixelDrift
seed.description: A browser-based particle physics playground with custom shaders and a level editor.

seed.title: VaultNote
seed.description: End-to-end encrypted note-taking app with biometric lock, built with React Native.

seed.title: SignalForge
seed.tagline: Anomaly detection for IoT sensor streams
seed.description: Real-time anomaly detection pipeline processing 50k events/sec using streaming ML models.

seed.title: Lattice CLI
seed.description: A fast Rust-based linter for Terraform and Pulumi configs with auto-fix support.

seed.title: Glasswing
seed.description: A themeable design system with 80+ accessible components, used across three internal products.

seed.title: Driftwood
seed.description: Experimental generative audio engine that composes ambient soundscapes from weather data.

seed.title: Quorum
seed.tagline: Async decision-making tool for distributed teams
seed.description: Lets remote teams reach consensus asynchronously with structured proposals and weighted voting.

searchChanged.name: searchChanged
searchChanged.payload: { value } — fires pipeOut getProjects via root

projStatsLoaded.name: projStatsLoaded
projStatsLoaded.payload: { total } — computed from live loop data

projectSelected.name: projectSelected
projectSelected.payload: { _id, title, category, year, status, tagline, link, description } — full record

formReset.name: formReset
formReset.payload: {} — clear all add/edit fields + reset editId

editMode.name: editMode
editMode.payload: { title, category, year, status, tagline, link, description } — pre-fill panel for edit

contactNameTyped.name: contactNameTyped
contactNameTyped.payload: { value } — live name for preview card

contactEmailTyped.name: contactEmailTyped
contactEmailTyped.payload: { value } — live email for preview card

contactMsgTyped.name: contactMsgTyped
contactMsgTyped.payload: { value } — live message for preview card

home.name: home
home.title: Home
home.description: Animated hero, typewriter tagline, count-up stats

about.name: about
about.title: About
about.description: Bio, animated skill bars, staggered experience timeline

projects.name: projects
projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Live searchable project gallery with full CRUD

contact.name: contact
contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact form with live preview card

getProjects.name: getProjects
getProjects.description: GET all projects — {{value}} from pipeOut payload = live search term

postProject.name: postProject
postProject.description: POST new project — bodyTemplate tokens resolved from runtimePayload in save logic

putProject.name: putProject
putProject.description: PUT update project — urlTemplate injects {{editId}} from runtimePayload

deleteProject.name: deleteProject
deleteProject.description: DELETE project by ID — urlTemplate injects {{editId}} from runtimePayload

postMessage.name: postMessage
postMessage.description: POST contact form message — write-only collection

projectGallery.name: projectGallery
projectGallery.description: Paginated project cards — 6/page, stagger fade-in via nth-child, click opens detail modal

miniProjectBadge.name: miniProjectBadge
miniProjectBadge.description: Reusable status badge widget — colored pill showing project status

editId.desc: ID of project being edited — empty = Add mode; set by modal Edit logic

selectedId.desc: ID of last clicked project — set inline in loop template onclick

css: .nav-btn{background:transparent;border:1px solid #1f2a30;color:#7dd3fc;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s}.nav-btn:hover{border-color:#22d3ee;color:#ecfeff}.nav-btn.nav-active{background:#0891b2;border-color:#22d3ee;color:#ecfeff}.action-btn{border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:9px 18px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:transform .15s,opacity .15s}.action-btn:hover{opacity:.88;transform:translateY(-1px)}.btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22d3ee,#0891b2);color:#04141a}.btn-ghost{background:transparent;border:1px solid #1f2a30;color:#7dd3fc}.btn-danger{background:transparent;border:1px solid #7f1d1d;color:#fca5a5}.form-input{background:#04141a;border:1px solid #15313a;border-radius:6px;color:#ecfeff;padding:9px 12px;font-size:13px;outline:none;width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;font-family:inherit;transition:border-color .15s;resize:vertical}.form-input:focus{border-color:#22d3ee}.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-width:22px;height:22px;padding:0 8px;background:#0a1b20;border:1px solid #15313a;border-radius:11px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#7dd3fc}.badge-new{background:rgba(34,211,238,.15);color:#67e8f9;border:1px solid rgba(34,211,238,.3);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px}.badge-edit{background:rgba(250,204,21,.15);color:#facc15;border:1px solid rgba(250,204,21,.3);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px}.hero{position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:0 0 24px 24px}.float-shape{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(6px);opacity:.35;animation:floatShape 7s ease-in-out infinite;pointer-events:none}@keyframes floatShape{0%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-22px) rotate(10deg)}100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg)}}.avatar-glow{animation:pulseGlow 2.6s ease-out infinite;border-radius:50%}@keyframes pulseGlow{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(34,211,238,.45)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 20px rgba(34,211,238,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(34,211,238,0)}}@keyframes fadeInUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}.fade-up{opacity:0;animation:fadeInUp .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) forwards}.type-line{display:inline-block;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;border-right:2px solid #22d3ee;width:0;animation:typewriter 1.6s steps(40,end) forwards,blinkCaret .7s step-end infinite}@keyframes typewriter{from{width:0}to{width:100%}}@keyframes blinkCaret{50%{border-color:transparent}}.stat-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:18px 10px;background:rgba(10,27,32,.6);border:1px solid #15313a;border-radius:10px;flex:1;gap:4px;text-align:center;opacity:0;animation:fadeInUp .6s ease forwards}.stat-num{font-size:26px;font-weight:900;color:#ecfeff;font-family:monospace}.stat-label{font-size:10px;color:#5d7e87;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px}.skill-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}.skill-name{flex:0 0 150px;color:#bae6fd;font-size:12px;font-weight:600}.skill-pct{flex:0 0 36px;text-align:right;color:#5d7e87;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace}.skill-track{flex:1;height:8px;border-radius:4px;background:#0a1b20;overflow:hidden}.skill-fill{height:8px;border-radius:4px;width:6%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0891b2,#67e8f9);transition:width 1.3s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.sk-1{width:95%!important}.sk-2{width:90%!important}.sk-3{width:88%!important}.sk-4{width:80%!important}.sk-5{width:85%!important}.sk-6{width:75%!important}.timeline-item{padding:14px 16px;background:rgba(10,27,32,.5);border:1px solid #15313a;border-left:3px solid #22d3ee;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;opacity:0;animation:fadeInUp .6s ease forwards}.timeline-role{color:#ecfeff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700}.timeline-meta{color:#5d7e87;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;margin-top:2px}.project-card{padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #112025;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;opacity:0;animation:fadeInUp .5s ease forwards}.project-card:hover{background:#081519}.project-card:nth-child(1){animation-delay:.04s}.project-card:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.09s}.project-card:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.14s}.project-card:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.19s}.project-card:nth-child(5){animation-delay:.24s}.project-card:nth-child(6){animation-delay:.29s}.status-badge{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:3px}.status-live{background:rgba(74,222,128,.15);color:#4ade80}.status-archived{background:rgba(148,163,184,.15);color:#94a3b8}.status-concept{background:rgba(250,204,21,.15);color:#facc15}.modal-backdrop{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(2,8,10,.7);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:50;backdrop-filter:blur(3px)}.modal-card{animation:modalIn .25s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) both;max-width:460px;width:90%;background:#0a1b20;border:1px solid #15313a;border-radius:12px;padding:22px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}@keyframes modalIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.94) translateY(10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) translateY(0)}}.preview-card{padding:16px;background:rgba(10,27,32,.6);border:1px solid #15313a;border-radius:10px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start}.preview-avatar{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0891b2,#22d3ee);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:14px;color:#04141a;flex-shrink:0}.mce-pagination{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin:8px 0}.mce-pagination button{background:#0a1b20;border:1px solid #15313a;color:#5d7e87;border-radius:4px;padding:3px 9px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace}.mce-pagination button:hover{background:#112025;color:#bae6fd}.mce-pagination button[disabled]{opacity:.25;cursor:default}

blocks.code: var titleEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M100"]');var catEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M101"]');var yearEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M102"]');var statusEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M103"]');var taglineEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M104"]');var linkEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M105"]');var descEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M106"]');var t=titleEl?titleEl.value.trim():'';var c=catEl?catEl.value.trim():'';var y=yearEl?yearEl.value.trim():'';var s=statusEl?(statusEl.value.trim()||'concept'):'concept';var tg=taglineEl?taglineEl.value.trim():'';var l=linkEl?linkEl.value.trim():'';var d=descEl?descEl.value.trim():'';var id=MCE_VARS['editId']||'';if(!t){EventBus.emit('validationFailed',{value:'Project title is required'});return;}var payload={title:t,category:c,year:y,status:s,tagline:tg,link:l,description:d};if(id){PipeSystem.execute('putProject',{},Object.assign({},payload,{editId:id}));}else{PipeSystem.execute('postProject',{},payload);}MCE_VARS['editId']='';EventBus.emit('closeAddForm',{});

var nameEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M127"]');var emailEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M128"]');var msgEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M129"]');var n=nameEl?nameEl.value.trim():'';var e=emailEl?emailEl.value.trim():'';var m=msgEl?msgEl.value.trim():'';if(!n||!e||!m){EventBus.emit('validationFailed',{value:'Name, email, and message are all required'});return;}if(e.indexOf('@')===-1){EventBus.emit('validationFailed',{value:'Please enter a valid email address'});return;}PipeSystem.execute('postMessage',{},{name:n,email:e,message:m});EventBus.emit('messageSent',{});

wires.actionArgs: ✓ Message sent — thanks for reaching out!

M18.name: hero_tagline
M18.text: Full-stack engineer & builder of weird things

M19.name: hero_sub
M19.text: I design and ship products end-to-end — from database schema to the last pixel of animation polish.

M38.name: about_bio
M38.text: I've spent the last seven years moving between frontend, backend, and the messy space in between — APIs that lie, animations that jank, databases that grow sideways. I like fixing all three in the same afternoon.

M75.name: tl_meta
M75.text: 2023 — Now · Leading platform architecture for a 40-person eng org

M78.name: tl_meta
M78.text: 2021 – 2023 · Shipped customer-facing web apps end to end

M81.name: tl_meta
M81.text: 2019 – 2021 · Built design systems and motion-heavy marketing sites

M84.name: tl_meta
M84.text: 2017 – 2019 · Worked with 15+ small businesses on web presence and tooling
